endorsements.title: Head Coach, SC Rockstar 16U
endorsements.text: Sofia is one of the most complete outside hitters I've coached in 15 years. Her court vision, arm swing, and ability to read blocks are exceptional. She leads by example every single practice and pushes the whole team to compete at a higher level.

endorsements.title: Director, SoCal Select
endorsements.text: Exceptional court vision and leadership under pressure. Sofia's kill efficiency is among the best I've seen at the 16U level nationally. Division I programs should be paying close attention.
